positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic journey. The central subject is a glowing, whimsical hot air balloon, filled with vibrant nebula colors (pinks, cyans, lavenders). The balloon floats through a deep, dark gradient night sky that subtly hints at constellations and distant galaxies. The style is ethereal, graphic, and highly contrasting, resembling negative space linework and bioluminescence art. Composition is perfectly centered, featuring strong silhouettes against glowing backdrops. Flat illustration, clean lines, vector art aesthetic, designed for apparel print, high contrast, deep blacks, limited palette with pops of luminous color, 4K.
